FFlagUserCheckTouchControlMode_Staged.purpose: Ensures a better touch interface for mobile players.

FFlagLuaAppChangeRecommendedGamesTitleLo.mechanism: Changes how recommended game titles are logged in the Lua application.
FFlagLuaAppChangeRecommendedGamesTitleLo.purpose: Improves the visibility and tracking of recommended games for better player suggestions.

FFlagUseNewDiscoverabilityModal_v2_Stage.mechanism: Introduces a new interface for discovering games.
FFlagUseNewDiscoverabilityModal_v2_Stage.purpose: Enhances the way players find new games, making it easier and more engaging.

FFlagFixGrassSurfaceLightShading_Staged.mechanism: Adjusts the lighting effects on grass surfaces in the game.
FFlagFixGrassSurfaceLightShading_Staged.purpose: Improves the visual quality of grass, making it look more realistic and appealing.

DFIntBase64NewDecodeReportHundredthsPerc.mechanism: Updates the way percentage data is decoded from Base64 encoding.
DFIntBase64NewDecodeReportHundredthsPerc.purpose: Provides more accurate reporting of performance metrics for better game analysis.

FFlagEnableNewChatTimeouts2_Staged.mechanism: Implements new timeout settings for chat messages.
FFlagEnableNewChatTimeouts2_Staged.purpose: Reduces spam and improves chat moderation, leading to a better communication experience for players.

FFlagStyleEditorPluginStyleSheets2_Stage.mechanism: Enhances the style editor plugin to support advanced stylesheets.
FFlagStyleEditorPluginStyleSheets2_Stage.purpose: Allows developers to create more visually appealing and customizable game interfaces.

DFFlagWriteFlagCacheAfterFlagFetch2_Stag.mechanism: Improves the caching system for flags by writing data after fetching.
DFFlagWriteFlagCacheAfterFlagFetch2_Stag.purpose: Increases the speed and efficiency of loading game features, enhancing player experience.

FFlagEnableUnifiedProductPurchaseFlowV37.mechanism: Streamlines the purchasing process for in-game items into a single flow.
FFlagEnableUnifiedProductPurchaseFlowV37.purpose: Makes it easier for players to buy items without confusion, improving the shopping experience.

FFlagSlimProfileTelemetry_Staged.mechanism: Reduces the amount of data collected for player profiles.
FFlagSlimProfileTelemetry_Staged.purpose: Improves performance and privacy by minimizing unnecessary data tracking.
